# Chain-mode delete + direction across a partitioned lot. The
# partition drive line splits the 400×300 lot into left + right
# regions; chain-mode actions must address the whole column/row of
# sub-edges in the seed's region, and direction annotations must
# apply to every sub-edge in the chain (not just the adjacent pair,
# which was the old apply_abstract_direction bug).

polygon outer
(0,0)
(400,0)
(400,300)
(0,300)
----
polygon outer 4 vertices, ccw, bbox (0,0)-(400,300), area 120000

set stalls-per-face=4
----

# Vertical partition drive line — splits the lot into left + right
# regions with independent aisle frames.
drive-line partitions
(200,0)
(200,300)
----
drive-line (200,0) -> (200,300) partitions

generate
----
total_stalls: 106
faces: 29 (boundary: 1, interior: 28)
graph: 63 vertices, 110 edges (perimeter: 28, interior: 82)
regions: 2

# Chain-mode delete inside the left region. The click at (100, 120)
# lands on a vertical column aisle; chain expansion walks the whole
# column.
annotation delete-edge
near=(100,120) mode=chain
----
annotation delete-edge on=grid region=0x00009109e264ab44 axis=x coord=-2 range=lattice:0,lattice:6

annotations
----
delete-edge on=grid region=0x00009109e264ab44 axis=x coord=-2 range=lattice:0,lattice:6

# The annotation must actually apply — stall count should change
# relative to baseline because a full column of aisle sub-edges is
# removed, which frees space the generator now fills with stalls.
generate
----
total_stalls: 118
faces: 25 (boundary: 1, interior: 24)
graph: 63 vertices, 97 edges (perimeter: 26, interior: 71)
regions: 2

# Chain-mode direction on a horizontal row in the right region.
annotation direction
near=(300,120) mode=chain traffic=two-way-reverse
----
annotation direction on=grid region=0x0000158801212a42 axis=y coord=2 range=lattice:-7,lattice:0 traffic=two-way-reverse

annotations
----
delete-edge on=grid region=0x00009109e264ab44 axis=x coord=-2 range=lattice:0,lattice:6
direction on=grid region=0x0000158801212a42 axis=y coord=2 range=lattice:-7,lattice:0 traffic=two-way-reverse

# Annotation must resolve (non-dormant) — apply_abstract_direction
# should touch every sub-edge in the chain, not just the adjacent pair.
# (`generate` echoes dormant_annotations; non-zero would surface here.)
generate
----
total_stalls: 118
faces: 25 (boundary: 1, interior: 24)
graph: 63 vertices, 97 edges (perimeter: 26, interior: 71)
regions: 2
